question: Will CPI rise more than 0.8% in March 2026?
reasoning: The official BLS March 2026 CPI report has been released showing CPI increased only 0.3% month-over-month on a seasonally adjusted basis, which is significantly below the 0.8% threshold required for a YES resolution. Since the market closes tomorrow and the data is already published, this market should resolve to NO with 100% certainty.
key_factors: Official BLS data shows 0.3% CPI increase in March 2026
Data already published, no uncertainty remaining
Market closes April 10th with resolution data available
risks: Extremely minimal risk of data revision
